title: onychium divaricatum
intro: Onychium divaricatum, also known as Forked Onychium, is a type of fern native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which aid in reducing swelling and protecting cells from damage. The health benefits of Onychium divaricatum include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in traditional Chinese medicine to treat fever, sore throats, and digestive problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
